hivm_bottleneck.global_evidence: [syncCycles=12362 cyc, barrierCycles=112 cyc, oneIterationCycles=8643 cyc, sync=143.0%, barrier=1.3%]
hivm_bottleneck.global_explanation: sync/barrier ratio exceeds HIVMBottleneckDiagnoser thresholds (sync>20% or barrier>15%)
global_suggestions: 减少全局 barrier，优先使用局部 set_flag/wait_flag
增加 multi-buffer pipeline depth 以隐藏同步等待

pipeline_diagnosis.explanation: PIPE_V weighted cycles dominate PIPE_S by 8.9x
suggestions: 将 PIPE_V 工作与其他 pipe 通过 multi-buffer/software pipeline 重叠
检查 Cube/Vector split 是否能更均衡利用 AIC/AIV
